selections.name: Thyme To Go
selections.reason: Strong exposed form with a 4th at Randwick and 2nd at Wyong. Fitter now and ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Pistoleer
selections.reason: Solid debut 3rd at Newcastle. Will be there at the business end.

selections.name: Killa
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott debutant with decent trials. Must respect the stable.

selections.name: Zunesha
selections.reason: First starter by Trapeze Artist. Second in a recent trial at Warwick Farm.

danger_horse.name: Acknowledge Me
danger_horse.reason: Second in a recent Kembla Grange barrier trial. Coming along well.

selections.name: Yeszem
selections.reason: Fit and racing well. 4th at Hawkesbury last start on a slow track. Looks a winnable race.

selections.name: Zougotme
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Consistent form last preparation. Looks ready to hit the ground running.

selections.name: Tsardeal
selections.reason: Needed the last run. Was 2nd at Goulburn two starts back. Open to improvement.

selections.name: Sachi
selections.reason: Resuming. Sneaky chance down in the weights from an inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Demonstrator
danger_horse.reason: First starter by So You Think. Runner-up in a trial at Rosehill.

selections.name: Leon Ruben
selections.reason: Good form at this track including a 2nd two starts back. Deserves another chance.

selections.name: Corpulent
selections.reason: Suited coming back in trip. Raced on the speed here two starts back for a solid 4th.

selections.name: She Can Salsa
selections.reason: Fitter for last run where she faded in the wet. Capable of testing this field on best form.

selections.name: I Am Overs
selections.reason: Consistent form including a 4th at Scone. Hard to beat on her best form.

danger_horse.name: Macho Grande
danger_horse.reason: Third-up. 2nd at Queanbeyan two starts back. Deserves another chance.

selections.name: Rose Of Fenway
selections.reason: Won well here last start over 6 1/2f on a rain-affected track. Fitter and ready for this.

selections.name: All Star
selections.reason: Won at Newcastle last start defeating a good field. Big chance on the back of that effort.

selections.name: Alamagan
selections.reason: Second-up. Good form last preparation. Expected to improve sharply.

selections.name: Emery
selections.reason: Resuming. Drops in class from Metro company. Progressed nicely last prep.

danger_horse.name: Lone Star Dream
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Not the roughest based on past fresh performances.

selections.name: Snitzel Miss
selections.reason: Drops in class from Canterbury. Nicely placed back at the provincials and capable of sharp improvement.

selections.name: Captain Peacock
selections.reason: Good debut 4th here on a heavy track. Has ability and another bold showing is on the cards.

selections.name: The Champion
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on steadily for 3rd here last start. Can't be left out.

selections.name: Equinox Legend
selections.reason: Resuming. Good trials leading in. Can feature with the help of gate one.

danger_horse.name: Adamantine
danger_horse.reason: Snowden debutant. Second in a recent trial. Must be respected.

selections.name: Villa Castina
selections.reason: Won well at Wyong last start on a rain-affected track. Back in form and worth following.

selections.name: Flying Grey
selections.reason: Won at Wyong last start. Going extra well this prep and another win is not out of the question.

selections.name: Just Shane
selections.reason: Consistent form including a 3rd at Hawkesbury last start. Hard to fault.

selections.name: Tequisoda
selections.reason: Drops from Metro company. Can return to form back at the provincials.

danger_horse.name: Marsabit
danger_horse.reason: Better placed today after a tough run at Rosehill. Expected to go well.

selections.name: Mcadam
selections.reason: Won well here last start over 7 1/4f. Likely to measure up again despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Glastonbury Girl
selections.reason: Consistent form including a 3rd at Newcastle last start. Big chance to return to the winner's list.

selections.name: My Shareena
selections.reason: Second-up. Good 4th at Newcastle fresh. Strips fitter and this looks an ideal assignment.

selections.name: Rico Suave
selections.reason: Second to Mcadam here last start. Strips fitter and should be competitive.

danger_horse.name: All Machiavellian
danger_horse.reason: Drops from Metro company. In the right race to make amends.

selections.name: You Sexy Thing
selections.reason: Resuming. Won last start at Doomben. Talented filly who is right in contention.

selections.name: Diacon
selections.reason: Third-up. Good 3rd at Wyong last start. Progressing nicely and should be peaking now.

selections.name: Cuesta
selections.reason: Resuming. Good form last preparation including a 2nd at Newcastle. Will improve on whatever she does here.

selections.name: Kitesurfing
selections.reason: Resuming. Won last start at Gosford. Might be better off following this outing but has class.

danger_horse.name: Wootten It Be Nice
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Expecting a positive return based on past fresh performances.
